metadata.ode_dynamics: dx/dt = production - x; at steady state x = production

equations.formula: ABA = prod(f(NCED3, ABA2)) * prod(g(CYP707A)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
ABI3 = prod(f(LEC1, LEC2, FUS3, ABI4)) * prod(g(VAL1, VAL2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
ABI5 = prod(f(SNRK2, ABA, ABI4)) * prod(g(RAV1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
AP1 = prod(f(FT, FD, SOC1, LFY, SPL9, FUL)) * prod(g(AP2, TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
AP2 = 1.0 * prod(g(miR172, SOC1, BZR1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
ARF19 = 1.0 * prod(g(IAA14, IAA28, HY5)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
ARF6 = prod(f(PIF4, BZR1)) * prod(g(AUX_IAA, DELLA)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Auxin = prod(f(TAA1, YUC8, TAR2, YUC4, AUX1, YUC_TAA, YUC10, YUC11, TAR1, PGP10)) * prod(g(GH3, DAO1, Decapitation)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
BBX11 = prod(f(PHYB, CRY1, BBX21)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
BIN2 = 1.0 * prod(g(COP1_SPA, BRI1, BAK1, SPA1, BSU1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
BRC1 = prod(f(Low_R_FR, SPL9, Auxin)) * prod(g(SMXL678, Cytokinin, BES1, FT, Sucrose, TIE1, Decapitation)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
BZR1 = prod(f(PP2A)) * prod(g(BIN2, DELLA)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
BZR_BES = prod(f(PP2A)) * prod(g(DELLA, BIN2, MAX2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Brassinosteroid = prod(f(DET2, DWF4, CPD, BR_SYN)) * prod(g(BAS1, SOB7)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
CO = prod(f(Long_Day, GI, FKF1, PHYA)) * prod(g(CDF1, DELLA, PHYB, ZTL)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
COP1_SPA = prod(f(SPA1)) * prod(g(PHYB, PHYA, CRY1, CRY2, UVR8)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Cell_Proliferation = prod(f(GRF, E2FA, TCP14)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
Cytokinin = prod(f(IPT5, IPT, Sucrose)) * prod(g(CKX2, CKX3, CKX5, AHP6, CKX9)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
DA1 = prod(f(DA2, EOD1)) * prod(g(Cytokinin)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
DELLA = prod(f(ABA, SPY)) * prod(g(GID1, SLY1, Gibberellin)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Endosperm_Proliferation = prod(f(SHB1, MINI3, IKU2, Auxin, BZR1)) * prod(g(AP2, Cytokinin, PRC2, RBR1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Ethylene = prod(f(ACS, ACO, ACS_ACO)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
FKF1 = prod(f(Blue_Light, GI, Light)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
FLC = prod(f(FRI, SVP)) * prod(g(VIN3, PRC2, FCA, FPA, FLD, FVE, LD, AUT_SYN, lncCOOLAIR, LDL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FT = prod(f(CO, PIF4, FKF1, GI, Warm_Temperature, T6P, TPS1, Photoperiod)) * prod(g(FLC, SVP, CDF1, AP2_TOE, FLM)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FUL = prod(f(FT, SPL9, SOC1)) * prod(g(TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
FUS3 = prod(f(ABI3, LEC2)) * prod(g(VAL1, VAL2, PKL)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Flowering_Time = prod(f(AP1, LFY, SOC1, FT)) * prod(g(TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
GA20OX1 = prod(f(PIF4_5_7)) * prod(g(ABA, Gibberellin)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
GA4 = prod(f(GA20OX1, GA3OX1)) * prod(g(GA2OX1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Gibberellin = prod(f(GA20OX1, GA3OX, Auxin)) * prod(g(GA2OX)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
HB21 = prod(f(BRC1, Low_R_FR)) * prod(g(Sucrose)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
HFR1 = prod(f(FHY1, PIF5, Light)) * prod(g(COP1_SPA)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
HSFA1D = prod(f(Temperature, COP1_SPA)) * prod(g(BIN2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
HY5 = prod(f(BBX21, UVR8, BBX11, PHYB)) * prod(g(Temperature, COP1_SPA, SPA1, BBX25)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Hypocotyl_Length = prod(f(PIF3, PIF4, PIF5, BZR1, ARF6)) * prod(g(HY5, DELLA, EIN3, HYH)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
IKU2 = prod(f(BZR1, IKU1, SHB1, MINI3)) * prod(g(RAV1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
IPT = prod(f(Nitrogen, Decapitation)) * prod(g(Auxin)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Integument_Growth = prod(f(UBP15, KLUH, TTG2, GIF1, Auxin, Cell_Proliferation_Duration, ANT, SEEDSTICK)) * prod(g(DA1, DA2, EOD1, SOD7, DPA4, AP2, ARF2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
LBD = prod(f(ARF7, ARF19, WOX11)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
LEC1 = 1.0 * prod(g(VAL1, VAL2, PKL)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
LEC2 = prod(f(FUS3)) * prod(g(VAL1, VAL2, PKL)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
LFY = prod(f(FT, SOC1, AGL24, SPL9)) * prod(g(DELLA, TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Lateral_Root_Density = prod(f(LBD, PLT, LAX3, PIN, ANR1, GATA23, BZR)) * prod(g(ARR_B, CLV1, EIN2, ABI4_5, DELLA, D14, MAX2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
MINI3 = prod(f(SHB1, IKU1)) * prod(g(RAV1, AIF2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Ovule_size = prod(f(ANT, Cytokinin, Cell_Proliferation, SEUSS)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIF3 = prod(f(DET1, EIN3)) * prod(g(PHYB, DELLA, BIN2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIF4 = prod(f(Warm_Temperature, DET1, BZR1, HSFA1D)) * prod(g(DELLA, GI, PHYB, CRY1, HFR1, ELF3_EC, TOC1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIF4_5_7 = prod(f(Temperature)) * prod(g(PHYB, HFR1, PAR1, DELLA, EC)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIF5 = prod(f(DET1)) * prod(g(UVR8, PHYB, ELF3_EC)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIF7 = prod(f(PIF4)) * prod(g(PHYB, CRY1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIN1 = prod(f(SMXL678, Auxin, Cytokinin, CAMEL, Sucrose)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
PIN3 = prod(f(Cytokinin, Nitrogen)) * prod(g(BRC1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
PRC2 = prod(f(MEA, FIS2, FIE, MSI1)) * prod(g(BZR1, Auxin)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Plant_Height = prod(f(BZR_BES, ARF6_7_8, ARR1, PIF4_5_7, Strigolactone)) * prod(g(SPL9, DELLA, EIN3, ABI5, FLOWER_INT, HY5)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SHB1 = prod(f(BZR1)) * prod(g(ABI5, AIF2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SMXL678 = prod(f(FHY3)) * prod(g(D14, MAX2)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SOC1 = prod(f(FT, FD, SPL9)) * prod(g(FLC, SVP, DELLA, AP2, TFL1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SPL9 = 1.0 * prod(g(DELLA, miR156, SMXL678, FHY3)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
SVP = 1.0 * prod(g(Warm_Temperature, FCA, FVE, SOC1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Seed_Size = prod(f(Integument_Growth, Endosperm_Proliferation, Ovule_size, GIF1, Storage_reserves)) * prod(g(ABA, ABI5)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Shoot_Branching = prod(f(Cytokinin, PIN1, PIN3, T6P, Sucrose)) * prod(g(BRC1, ABA, ARR1)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
Storage_reserves = prod(f(LEC1, LEC2, FUS3, ABI3)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
Strigolactone = prod(f(MAX1, MAX3, MAX4, SL_SYN, CCD7, CCD8, D27, LBO)) * prod(g(Decapitation, Sucrose, Nitrogen)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
VIN3 = prod(f(Cold, Vernalization, Cold_Vernalization)) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous
miR172 = prod(f(SPL9)) * prod(g(AP2, miR156)) * gene_modifier + exogenous
